records.summary: Basic contact page listing a physical address, email, phone, and mobile number. Office hours are Monday to Friday 9am–6pm with weekends closed — no emergency or out-of-hours provision whatsoever.
records.topOpportunity: Full emergency contact page redesign: prominent click-to-call buttons, 24/7 emergency number, response time guarantee, service area map, and a WhatsApp/text option for after-hours lockouts
records.notes: A locked-out customer landing here on a Saturday night would find zero help — closed weekends, no emergency line, no chat, no map; this is a textbook high-value redesign prospect.
